pageHeader.title: Podcast
pageHeader.subtitle: The Mahabharata Dialogues
pageHeader.description: A podcast series exploring the depths of the Mahabharata through scholarly conversations, narrative explorations, and philosophical reflections.

podcastInfo.title: The Mahabharata Dialogues
podcastInfo.description: Join Varun Gupta as he engages with fellow scholars, researchers, and enthusiasts in thoughtful conversations about the Mahabharata. Each episode explores a different aspect of the epic — from textual analysis to philosophical inquiry, from character studies to contemporary relevance.

episodes.title: Why the Mahabharata Matters Today
episodes.description: An introductory episode exploring the enduring relevance of the Mahabharata in the 21st century — why this ancient epic continues to captivate and instruct modern audiences.

episodes.title: The Character of Krishna: Divine or Human?
episodes.description: A deep dive into the most enigmatic character of the Mahabharata — Krishna. We explore his roles as diplomat, philosopher, and divine incarnation.

episodes.title: Draupadi: The Woman Who Changed the Course of the Epic
episodes.description: An examination of Draupadi's pivotal role in the Mahabharata — her agency, her suffering, and her defiance that set the stage for the great war.

episodes.title: The Concept of Dharma: A Conversation with Dr. Ananya Sharma
episodes.description: Special guest Dr. Ananya Sharma joins Varun to discuss the philosophical complexities of dharma as presented in the Mahabharata.

episodes.title: The Mahabharata War: Historical Evidence and Scholarly Debates
episodes.description: An exploration of the archaeological, literary, and geographical evidence for the Mahabharata war and the scholarly debates surrounding its historicity.

seo.title: The Mahabharata Dialogues Podcast | Varun Gupta
seo.description: Listen to The Mahabharata Dialogues podcast hosted by Varun Gupta — scholarly conversations exploring the epic's narratives, philosophy, and contemporary relevance.
